2025-26 Golden State Warriors Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 37-45, Finished 10th in NBA Western Conference

Coach: Steve Kerr (37-45)

Executive: Mike Dunleavy

PTS/G: 114.6 (22nd of 30) Opp PTS/G: 115.2 (14th of 30)

SRS: -0.34 (20th of 30) Pace: 99.0 (19th of 30)

Off Rtg: 115.0 (18th of 30) Def Rtg: 115.6 (17th of 30) Net Rtg: -0.6 (20th of 30)

Expected W-L: 40-42 (20th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +2500, Over-Under 47.5

Arena: Chase Center Attendance: 740,624 (17th of 30)
